name: Clean Tech / Flat Design
description: Flat icons, bold color-coded sections, crisp edges, white background, sans-serif labels. Minimal shadows. Best for documentation and technical audiences.

name: Isometric 3D
description: 3D perspective with depth, shadows, and gradient fills. Isometric grid alignment. High visual impact for presentations and executive decks.

name: Blueprint / Engineering
description: Dark navy background, white or cyan technical lines, engineering/schematic aesthetic. Monochromatic with accent highlights. Great for infrastructure and network diagrams.

name: Infographic / Presentation
description: Colorful sections, large illustrative icons, banner-style labels, presentation-ready layout. Best for non-technical stakeholders and slide decks.

name: Hand-Drawn / Whiteboard
description: Rough sketch aesthetic, pencil-style or marker lines, sticky-note colors, informal and brainstorming feel. Ideal for workshops and early-stage ideation.

name: Neon Dark / Cyberpunk
description: Dark background, glowing neon-colored elements, bright edge lines. Cyberpunk or data-mesh aesthetic. High contrast, suitable for tech conferences and digital media.

name: Minimal Outline / Editorial
description: Black-and-white or two-tone, thin outlines only, clean editorial or documentation style. No fills, maximum readability in print or monochrome contexts.

name: Split Screen / Before & After
description: Full-bleed two-panel layout with strong visual contrast between panels. Left side in muted/dark/messy style, right side in clean/bright/modern style.

name: Circular Gradient / Flow Loop
description: Smooth color gradient along a circular or elliptical path, pill-shaped stage labels. Ideal for conveying continuous, iterative processes.

name: Radar / Spider Chart
description: Overlapping polygon radar chart showing multi-dimensional comparison across criteria axes. Best for comparing 3+ options across 4+ dimensions simultaneously.

name: Conference Room Whiteboard
description: Diagram drawn on a large office whiteboard inside a modern meeting room, with realistic dry-erase marker strokes, subtle reflections, pinned notes, and natural presentation context.

name: Glass Board Workshop
description: Semi-transparent glass wall board style with layered marker lines, sticky notes, workshop annotations, and a creative studio atmosphere. Slight parallax and hand-drawn energy.

name: macOS Window Showcase
description: Diagram presented inside a polished macOS application window with traffic-light controls, soft shadows, rounded corners, sidebar or toolbar chrome, and clean Apple-inspired UI framing.

name: Control Panel / Console
description: Futuristic panel or operations console aesthetic with segmented modules, indicator lights, tactical lines, dark surfaces, and precision UI framing around the diagram.

name: MacBook Desk Mockup
description: Diagram displayed on a MacBook screen in a premium desk setup, with device bezel, keyboard edge, subtle perspective, ambient lighting, and a refined product mockup presentation feel.

name: Brand Style Guide
description: Mood-board layout with color swatches, typeface specimens, logo lockup previews, and usage examples arranged on a clean editorial canvas. Ideal for branding presentations and design system documentation.

name: Notebook / Sketchpad
description: Lined or dotted notebook paper texture with pencil or ink sketch aesthetic, hand-lettered labels, and margin annotations. Ideal for concept ideation, logo exploration, and early-stage diagram drafts.
